1101401.name: Oh, Let the Smell of Burning Blood...

coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttackHead] If this unit has [ChickenStance], or if this unit has less than 50% HP, Reuse this Coin (once per Skill)
[OnSucceedAttackHead] If this unit has [ChickenStance], or if this unit has less than 50% HP, Reuse this Coin (once per Skill)

[OnSucceedAttackHead] If this unit has [ChickenStance], or if this unit has less than 50% HP, Reuse this Coin (once per Skill)
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Deal (10% of this Coin's final damage) bonus Wrath damage

descs.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
[StartBattle] If this unit has [ChickenStance], or if this unit has less than 50% HP, convert all Coins to [SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] Gain 1 [ChickenStance]
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Combustion] + [Burst]), Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Apply 2 [Combustion] to target and self

[WideAreaRampage]
Deal +1% damage for every 2% (missing HP percentage on target + missing HP percentage on self) (max 50%)
[StartBattle] If this unit has [ChickenStance], or if this unit has less than 50% HP, convert all Coins to [SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] Gain 1 [ChickenStance]
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Burst]) on target (max 2)
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 20% missing HP on self (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Apply 2 [Combustion] to target and self
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Deal (10% of this Coin's final damage) bonus Gluttony damage

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Combustion]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Deal (20% of this Coin's final damage) bonus Gluttony damage against all targets

descs.desc:
[DuelCounter]
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [ChickenStance] next turn
[WhenUse] If this unit has [ChickenStance], Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Apply 2 [Combustion] to target and self

[DuelCounter]
[WhenUse] Gain 3 [ChickenStance] next turn
[WhenUse] If target has 10+ ([Combustion] + [Burst]), Base Power +1
[WhenUse] If this unit has [ChickenStance], Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] This Skill deals +1% damage for every 3% HP this unit cumulatively lost in this Encounter (max 30%)
[DefeatDuel] Apply 2 [Combustion] to target and self

1101402.name: Gamefowl
1101402.desc:
When activating [HeishouCombo], The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu gains the following effect as the [HeishouComboCountHonglu] effect:
- When using a Skill to inflict [Burst] Potency or Count, inflict 1 [Combustion] (3 times per turn)

Cannot be Staggered or fall below 1 HP due to [Combustion] damage.

Gain 3 [ChickenStance] in the same turn it Substitutes or Returns in.

1101401.name: Let's Get Battle-drunk
1101401.desc:
On Hit against targets with 7+ [Burst], (highest Reson. x 15)% chance to inflict 1 [Combustion] (4 times per turn)

Combat End: if this unit has [Combustion], gain 1 [ChickenStance], 1 [CrimsonDamageUp], and 1 [ShamrockDamageUp] at the next Turn Start

Combat Start: gain 1 [AttackUp] and [DefenseUp] for every 20% missing HP on self (max 3)

1101421.name: Bloodflame Blade [血炎刀]
1101421.desc: When an ally with the fastest Speed inflicts [Combustion] or [Burst] Potency with their Skills, inflict 1 [Combustion] and [Burst] Potency (once per turn)
